nasb.text: And He said to them, “Cast the net on the right-hand side of the boat and you will find a catch.” So they cast, and then they were not able to haul it in because of the great number of fish.

esv.text: He said to them, “Cast the net on the right side of the boat, and you will find some.” So they cast it, and now they were not able to haul it in, because of the quantity of fish.

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“把網撒在船的右邊，就可以得著。”他們就把網撒下去，可是拉不上來，因為魚太多。

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“在船的右边下网就会打到鱼。”于是他们照着祂的话把网撒下去，网到的鱼多到连网都拉不动。

csbs.text: 耶稣说：“你们把网撒在船的右边，就会捕到。”他们就把网撒下，竟拉不上来，因为鱼很多。
